component.name: TuxPanel Installer
component.summary: Install and manage TuxPanel — a self-hosted Linux admin dashboard

description.p: TuxPanel is a web-based administration dashboard for Linux servers. This installer provides a graphical wizard for choosing components (VNC, RDP bridge, desktop environments), configuring the systemd service, and managing updates.
After installation, a system tray indicator keeps you informed of service status and lets you restart or open the dashboard with a click.
Initial release — install wizard, component picker, systemd integration, and system tray indicator.
